Engaging Info <


Engaging Info

Info I find fun and useful

Podcasts

Lex Fridman - data scientist with captivating guests from scientific world and not only.
Sean Carroll - theoretical physicist that will blow your mind with multiverse theory.
Andrew Huberman - neuroscientist, who will give you substantial tips on bettering your life from physiological and neurological perspectives.

Fascinating Projects

Neuralink - yes, it’s the chip in your brain.
Replika - A.I. agent that is always there for you.
Our World in Data - see the world through the positive trends and more.

Useful Links

Sci-Hub - public access to research papers.
